prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Provide a quick fleet-status snapshot. Enumerate the transformers currently in service, then for one representative healthy unit (T-005) and one degraded unit (T-013) surface the available sensor channels and a recent telemetry sample for each channel so a comparative read of operational state can be made.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should list the in-service transformer IDs, then for each of T-005 and T-013 surface the available sensor channels and a recent telemetry sample for each channel, and call out any qualitative difference between the two units.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [iot] list_assets — Enumerate all transformers currently in service
  Step 2: [iot] get_asset_metadata — Get metadata for a healthy unit (T-005) and a degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [iot] list_sensors — List available sensor channels for the healthy unit (T-005) and the degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [2])
  Step 4: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get a recent telemetry sample for each sensor channel on the healthy unit (T-005) (depends on steps [3])
  Step 5: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get a recent telemetry sample for each sensor channel on the degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [3])
  Step 6: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Get the most recent DGA record for the healthy unit (T-005) (depends on steps [2])
  Step 7: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Get the most recent DGA record for the degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [2])
  Step 8: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Analyze the DGA record for the healthy unit (T-005) (depends on steps [6])
  Step 9: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Analyze the DGA record for the degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [7])
  Step 10: [iot] list_assets — Enumerate all transformers currently in service
  Step 11: [iot] get_asset_metadata — Get metadata for a healthy unit (T-005) and a degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [10])
  Step 12: [iot] list_sensors — List available sensor channels for the healthy unit (T-005) and the degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [11])
  Step 13: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get a recent telemetry sample for each sensor channel on the healthy unit (T-005) (depends on steps [12])
  Step 14: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get a recent telemetry sample for each sensor channel on the degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [12])
  Step 15: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Get the most recent DGA record for the healthy unit (T-005) (depends on steps [13])
  Step 16: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Get the most recent DGA record for the degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [14])
  Step 17: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Analyze the DGA record for the healthy unit (T-005) (depends on steps [15])
  Step 18: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Analyze the DGA record for the degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [16])
  Step 19: [iot] list_assets — Provide a quick fleet-status snapshot. Enumerate the transformers currently in service.
  Step 20: [iot] get_asset_metadata — Get metadata for a healthy unit (T-005) and a degraded unit (T-013). (depends on steps [19])
  Step 21: [iot] list_sensors — List available sensor channels for the healthy unit (T-005) and the degraded unit (T-013). (depends on steps [20])
  Step 22: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get a recent telemetry sample for each sensor channel on the healthy unit (T-005). (depends on steps [21])
  Step 23: [iot] get_sensor_readings — Get a recent telemetry sample for each sensor channel on the degraded unit (T-013). (depends on steps [21])
  Step 24: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Get the most recent DGA record for the healthy unit (T-005). (depends on steps [20])
  Step 25: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Get the most recent DGA record for the degraded unit (T-013). (depends on steps [21])
  Step 26: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Analyze the DGA record for the healthy unit (T-005). (depends on steps [24])
  Step 27: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Analyze the DGA record for the degraded unit (T-013). (depends on steps [25])

6. T-013: Power Transformer T-013, Location Unknown, Health Status: 0, RUL Days: 0

Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:

    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,

    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,

}
